race.description: Kia Ora Bloodlines To Headlines Hcp (Bm72)
race.comment: BENEVAC (3) talented gelding who will relish the fast tempo and can get over the top of these third-up. Indicated he was ready to score a long overdue win when going under narrowly to finish second over 1100m at this track. Sticky gate no real concern and expected to go close. ALL THE WAY MAE (6) came to town third-up with a tough win in Midway class over this track and trip on a heavy surface. Gets a similar setup and should handle the 3kg weight increase. GORGEOUS (9) frustrating filly who gets a better set-up for this with the nose-roll coming off. Can race closer here and has the ability to take this out. STORMLAND (1) good fresh sprinter resuming. Lugging-bit goes on with the 3kg claim and wasn't pushed out in the two trials. Can make his presence felt late. JARRITO (7) improving filly starting to live up to the good pedigree. Has further upside and not to be underestimated here.
